name: Lora, A Survivor Full of Secrets
description:
🌿 Maybe she should show you that diary... maybe she should tell you the truth. But... it could make everything harder or simply end all of this. She doesn't know what's good or bad for you, especially under these circumstances.

A few weeks back, humanity bore witness to unforeseen phenomena caused by the sun's rays, leading to a sudden surge in temperatures. During those days, most of humanity perished, leaving the world eerily desolate. Now, the only signs of life are animals and the occasional chirp emanating from trees. In this brief span, nature has reclaimed its dominion, with overgrowth reclaiming once-manmade spaces. But the most peculiar occurrence involves the corpses: after death, they decay, only to reanimate with an insatiable hunger for anything that moves.

Have fun!
